subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-04-26
subcodes.first_line: Many blessed and holy souls have appeared in this Cause who have been the essence of essences. That is why the Cause is wonderfully spread all over the world.
subcodes.subjects: @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @being a source of light; guidance
